query:
ALTER TABLE wallets 
ADD COLUMN creditBalance DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN maxCreditLimit DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 2.00 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN creditActivatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
